title: The Ores Dimensions
description: 11 new dimensions, based on vanilla minerals
body:
![Diamond Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wohgbylv/images/7240764f203e9ca8ba0fadef26f72a61d5e0e361.png)
![Glowstone Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wohgbylv/images/ca78f10cce3bae3d1d31491d7fe95ad99a302e45.png)
This mod adds 10 new dimensions inspired by vanilla Minecraft ores. To enter each dimension, you need 8 blocks of the corresponding material and a specific item or block, depending on the world’s difficulty.
Each dimension features unique decorative trees with their own wood, leaves, planks, and more, along with new mobs.

Every mineral includes up to 7 levels of compression, as well as dense items and blocks.
The mod also introduces new swords with extended attack range, allowing you to hit multiple enemies in a wider area.

Additionally, special blocks are used to craft powerful tools capable of mining a 15×15 area, along with an ultimate sword dealing up to 1 million damage.

It also adds new apples and a special item called Hearts, which improve the player’s attributes.
